assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all mentioned notification types in a table format, including security patches, auto-upgrade scheduled, end-of-life warnings, new version available notifications, plus additional relevant types

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Security patches are assigned Medium urgency (🟡), not highest priority. End-of-life warnings and deprecated APIs get High priority (🔴), while new version available correctly gets Low priority (🟢)

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response assigns High priority to EoS warnings with specific actions including checking clusters approaching EoS, planning upgrades, and acting within 2-4 weeks of notification

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response provides specific pre-upgrade checklist items including verifying cluster health with kubectl commands, checking monitoring/alerting, and ensuring team awareness

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Security patches are labeled as 'Monitor auto-upgrade' with auto-application timeline, but no mention of expedited upgrades or actions outside normal maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response correctly categorizes new version available as Low priority with explicit statement 'No immediate action required' and suggests planning for future upgrade cycles

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response provides specific gcloud commands for creating log-based alerts using Pub/Sub topics for high-priority GKE notifications

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Review release notes for new features or breaking changes' as an action item for new version available notifications
